reasoning: The OVX index value of 37.9 indicates slightly elevated volatility in crude oil ETFs. Volatility indices tend to be highly mean-reverting and positively skewed—they spike quickly and bleed down slowly over time. Because 37.9 is above the historical median (typically closer to 30), the index is more likely to decline than increase over a multi-month period barring renewed geopolitical shocks or supply disruptions. Hence, the probability of an increase is estimated slightly below 50%, roughly in line with the empirical base rate for this question type.
